title: Add Referencing Object Name to object_fields Data Model
description: Add a new column to the `object_fields` data model to store the referencing object name from Salesforce metadata. The value comes as a single-element array (e.g., `["Opportunity"]`) and identifies the exact object a field references. Stored in the database only — not displayed in the data table UI.
acceptance_criteria: Referencing object name is fetched from Salesforce and stored in object_fields table
Value is not displayed in the front-end data table
middleware_changes: Fetch referencing object name from Salesforce metadata and store during object field sync.
data_model_changes: New column in object_fields table for referencing object name.
implementation_notes: Value comes as a single-element array from Salesforce REST API. Stored for backend reference only.
comment_summary: Waqar fetched and stored the data. Confirmed no UI display needed.
